violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the makeline area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -exterior of 1 door cooler -can storage rack -mixer -fanguards in walk-in cooler -fan New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The walls and floor in the storage hallway area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Celling tiles in the food preparation areas were observed with large water stains or in poor repair. Ceiling tiles in kitchen areas front and back are constructed of composite acoustic tiles that are not smooth, durable, non-absorbent and easily cleanable. Celling tiles need to be replaced with a smooth, durable, non-absorbent easily cleanable material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2024
The floor tiles by the back area handsink and greasetrap are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
The ceiling tiles above the make line area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025

The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

No faucet observed at 3 bay sink; spray hose observed at 3 bay sink. Staff was observed using the faucet at handsink to fill buckets of water to fill basins of 3 bay sink. Faucet required at 3 bay sink. The water source and system shall be of sufficient capacity to meet the peak water demands of the food establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Sink drain pump at handsink was not in use during time of inspection. Per owner, plumber is waiting on parts. Sewage shall be conveyed to the point of disposal through an approved sanitary sewage system or other system, including use of sewage transport vehicles, waste retention tanks, pumps, pipes, hoses, and connections that are constructed, maintained, and operated according to law. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Celling tiles in the food preparation areas were observed with large water stains or in poor repair. Ceiling tiles in kitchen areas front and back are constructed of composite acoustic tiles that are not smooth, durable, non-absorbent and easily cleanable. Celling tiles need to be replaced with a smooth, durable, non-absorbent easily cleanable material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2024
The floor tiles by the back area handsink and greasetrap are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. State guidance provided to site. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The hand-washing sink in the pizza prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as dressings) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was actively being cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Various foods in cookline prep unit was observed held at 46-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ambient was observed at ranging temperatures of 47-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Per interview of staff, food was prepared and placed recently. Foods were moved to other refrigeration to chill. Unit was adjusted to a colder setting during time of inspection. Equipment must maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Various desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Displaying individual labels of product per shelf of product type discussed with staff. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Knives were observed on an unclean surface (in between prep unit and prep table) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The cutting board on the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the various equipment (on and around oven, cookline grill, burner, fryer, refrigerator units) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

No faucet observed at 3 bay sink; spray hose observed at 3 bay sink. Staff was observed using the faucet at handsink to fill buckets of water to fill basins of 3 bay sink. Faucet required at 3 bay sink. The water source and system shall be of sufficient capacity to meet the peak water demands of the food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The mop sink was observed leaking onto floor. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Sink drain pump at handsink was observed leaking onto floor when in use. Sewage shall be conveyed to the point of disposal through an approved sanitary sewage system or other system, including use of sewage transport vehicles, waste retention tanks, pumps, pipes, hoses, and connections that are constructed, maintained, and operated according to law. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Celling tiles in the food preparation areas were observed with large water stains or in poor repair. Ceiling tiles in kitchen areas front and back are constructed of composite acoustic tiles that are not smooth, durable, non-absorbent and easily cleanable. Celling tiles need to be replaced with a smooth, durable, non-absorbent easily cleanable material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2024

The following has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris:- kitchen hoods- floor under equipment and storage- ceiling and floors in back storage hallway The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The floor tiles by the back area handsink and greasetrap are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC that holds FMC license with RIDOH-CFP was not present at time of inspection. No staff member on duty has an 8hr food safety certificate. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Hand washing sink closest to pizza station was observed out of order. Per interview with staff member there is a leak in the pipe. Hand sink shall be repaired so that it is operating properly. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towel shall be provided at hand sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023

Celling tiles in front kitchen area were observed with large water stains. Ceiling tiles in kitchen areas front and back are constructed of a material that is not smooth, durable and non-absorbent and easily cleanable. Celling tiles need to be replaced with a smooth, durable, non-absorbent easily cleanable material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Mop sink was not accessible as it was observed to be used for storage. Mop sink shall be accessible and functional so that gray water can properly be disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023
